nodes.name: env-lab.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for CLI environment lab functionality, verifying environment variable parsing and isolation behavior.

nodes.name: feedback.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the CLI feedback command, using a makeTrace helper to construct trace fixtures that simulate agent execution traces sent as feedback.

nodes.name: makeTrace
nodes.summary: Factory function that constructs a complete agent trace fixture with sensible defaults, accepting overrides for test parameterization.

nodes.name: embedded-postgres.ts
nodes.summary: Re-export barrel for embedded PostgreSQL test support utilities, providing helper functions and types used by integration tests that require a real database.

nodes.name: zip.ts
nodes.summary: Test helper that implements a minimal ZIP archive builder in pure TypeScript, used to create plugin zip fixtures for CLI tests without external dependencies.

nodes.name: createStoredZipArchive
nodes.summary: Builds a stored (uncompressed) ZIP archive from a map of filename-to-content entries, producing a valid binary buffer conforming to the ZIP specification.

nodes.name: home-paths.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite validating home directory path resolution utilities used by the CLI to locate configuration, data, and runtime files.

nodes.name: http.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the HTTP CLI adapter, verifying event formatting and output behavior when the CLI communicates with the Paperclip server over HTTP.

nodes.name: network-bind.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for network binding logic that determines how the CLI binds to local or remote hosts based on configuration.

nodes.name: onboard.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for the CLI onboarding flow, testing config file creation and migration using temporary directory fixtures.

nodes.name: createExistingConfigFixture
nodes.summary: Creates a fully-populated temporary config fixture directory on disk with representative agent, service, and runtime config files for onboarding migration tests.

nodes.name: plugin-init.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the CLI plugin initialization command, verifying scaffold generation into temporary directories with cleanup between tests.

nodes.name: routines.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration test suite for the CLI routines command, using a writeTestConfig helper to set up complete config fixtures before verifying routine scheduling and execution.

nodes.name: writeTestConfig
nodes.summary: Writes a complete Paperclip config JSON fixture to disk for routines integration tests, wiring up agents, services, and database connection strings.

nodes.name: secrets.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for the CLI secrets management commands, using factory helpers to construct agent, secret, and config fixtures with configurable secrets providers.

nodes.name: configWithSecretsProvider
nodes.summary: Factory function that builds a full Paperclip config fixture pre-wired with a specific secrets provider, used to test secrets resolution across different provider backends.

nodes.name: telemetry.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for CLI telemetry opt-in/opt-out behavior, using a makeConfigPath helper to create config fixtures with telemetry enabled or disabled.

nodes.name: makeConfigPath
nodes.summary: Creates a temporary Paperclip config directory on disk with telemetry enabled or disabled, returning the config path for use in telemetry tests.

nodes.name: worktree-merge-history.test.ts
nodes.summary: Test suite for worktree merge history logic, providing factory helpers for issues, comments, document revisions, attachments, projects, and project workspaces to build complex merge scenario fixtures.

nodes.name: worktree.test.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test suite for CLI worktree operations, covering worktree creation, syncing, agent assignment, and lifecycle management across 1300+ lines of test scenarios.

nodes.name: buildSourceConfig
nodes.summary: Constructs a complete Paperclip source config fixture with agents, services, and runtime settings used as the baseline for worktree test scenarios.

nodes.name: format-event.ts
nodes.summary: Formats raw HTTP stdout events from the Paperclip server for CLI display, trimming whitespace before printing to console.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Entry point for the HTTP CLI adapter module, exporting the httpCLIAdapter implementation used when the CLI communicates with the server over HTTP.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export for the CLI adapters module, exposing getCLIAdapter and the CLIAdapterModule type to callers that need to select an adapter at runtime.

nodes.name: format-event.ts
nodes.summary: Formats raw process stdout events from agent subprocesses for CLI display, trimming whitespace before printing to console.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Entry point for the process CLI adapter module, exporting the processCLIAdapter implementation used when the CLI manages agents as local subprocesses.

nodes.name: registry.ts
nodes.summary: Adapter registry that maps adapter type strings to their CLI adapter implementations, providing a getCLIAdapter factory used throughout the CLI to select HTTP or process adapters at runtime.

nodes.name: getCLIAdapter
nodes.summary: Looks up and returns the registered CLI adapter for the given type string, acting as the central dispatch point for adapter selection.

nodes.name: agent-jwt-secret-check.ts
nodes.summary: Pre-flight check that validates and ensures the agent JWT secret is present — reading from env vars or an env file, then generating a new secret if absent.

nodes.name: agentJwtSecretCheck
nodes.summary: Runs the agent JWT secret pre-flight check: reads from env or env file, reports status, and auto-generates a secret when none exists.

nodes.name: config-check.ts
nodes.summary: Pre-flight check that verifies the Paperclip configuration file exists and is valid, reporting errors and the resolved config path to the user.

nodes.name: configCheck
nodes.summary: Resolves and validates the CLI config file, returning a structured check result with pass/fail status and descriptive error messages.

nodes.name: database-check.ts
nodes.summary: Pre-flight check that verifies database connectivity and ensures required runtime directories exist, dynamically importing the Drizzle DB module to test the connection.

nodes.name: databaseCheck
nodes.summary: Runs the database pre-flight check: dynamically imports the DB driver, executes a test query, resolves runtime paths, and creates missing directories.

nodes.name: deployment-auth-check.ts
nodes.summary: Pre-flight check that verifies authentication secrets required for public deployment — validating BETTER_AUTH_SECRET and PAPERCLIP_AGENT_JWT_SECRET env vars based on the inferred bind mode.

nodes.name: deploymentAuthCheck
nodes.summary: Checks that auth-related env vars are set when deploying publicly, returning detailed check results per secret with appropriate warnings for remote bind mode.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export for all CLI pre-flight check functions, consolidating agentJwtSecretCheck, configCheck, databaseCheck, deploymentAuthCheck, llmCheck, logCheck, portCheck, secretsCheck, and storageCheck into a single import surface.
